sections.paragraph:
Original: גּולן

Transliteration: gôlân

Phonetic: go-lawn'

BDB Definition:

Golan = "their captivity: their rejoicing"
  1. a town of Manasseh in the heights of Bashan east of the Jordan; a city of refuge

Origin: from H1473

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
